Innate Abilities, Weirdness & Mutations

You are insubstantial and cannot be petrified, ensnared, or set on fire.
You are immune to poison.
You are cold resistant. (rC+)
You are immune to negative energy. (rN+++)
You are immune to unholy pain and torment.
You float through the air rather than walking.
You can equip up to 6 pieces of aux armour in any combination and unleash them.
You gain AC when you inflict magical misfortune on nearby enemies.
You recover more slowly from Doom and Banes.

Message History

The thermic dynamo engulfs you but does no damage.
The deep elf knight gestures wildly while chanting.
The deep elf knight flickers and vanishes!
The deep elf zephyrmancer hits you but does no damage.
The thermic dynamo barely misses you. The thermic dynamo engulfs you.
The thermic dynamo freezes you! You resist.
Okay, then.
Blink to where?
Press: ? - help, Dir - move target
Okay, then.
Blink to where?
Press: ? - help, Dir - move target
The zombie hands lose their grip on something.
As you read the scroll of blinking, it crumbles to dust.
A wild whirl of ice shoots out from the thermic dynamo at you.
The rebounding bolt of cold hits you! You resist.
* * * LOW HITPOINT WARNING * * *
As you read the scroll of teleportation, it crumbles to dust.
You feel strangely unstable.
A wild whirl of fire shoots out from the thermic dynamo at you.
The rebounding bolt of fire hits you!!!
* * * LOW HITPOINT WARNING * * *
The thermic dynamo overcharges itself and releases excess heat at you.
The rebounding bolt of fire misses you.
Okay, then.
As you read the scroll of fog, it dissolves into smoke.
You feel better.
Your surroundings suddenly seem different.
As you read the scroll of teleportation, it crumbles to dust.
You feel strangely unstable.
The thermic dynamo overflows with ice and vents excess cold at you.
The rebounding bolt of cold hits something!!
The rebounding bolt of cold hits you! You resist.
* * * LOW HITPOINT WARNING * * *
You hear some strange, mumbled words.
A shard of ice appears from out of thin air!
The shard of ice misses you.
The deep elf zephyrmancer points at you and mumbles some strange words.
The bolt of lightning hits you!
You die...
